---
layout: cv
title: Bryce Quigley's CV
---
# Isaac Newton
Programmer, data engineer, meme enjoyer


## Currently

Getting the hang of GitHub

### Specialized in

Python, C#, and SQL


### Research interests

AI, data science, and programming


## Education

`2017-2021`
__Kuna High School__

`September 2024 - now`
__Brigham Young Univeristy, Idaho__

## Occupation

__Full time student__

<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: May 2013 -->
